name: @ambient-matrix/agent-status-bridge
description: Mac-side bridge that watches Codex and Claude Code state and publishes normalized status for the lamp pipeline.

scripts.check: biome check src test scripts package.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts README.md .gitignore && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.format: biome format --write src test scripts package.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts README.md .gitignore
